item.title: Mexican Tv host says the truth about the antivaxxers
item.description: A TV host from the state of Jalisco had a "don't look up" moment and exploded against antivaxxers and those who don't wear a facemask. Here's the complete video https://youtu.be/_WnTXFUYmJM Wear a mask, and get your shots.

Sound
.
Sound
.
Sound
.
No sound
No sound I guess
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
It's true. I hate this. I want tobacco but I want health more just not right now
item.dc:creator: Qpnao

item.title: This is so heartwarming
item.description:
Joshua was shaken as a baby and they were told he is unlikely to survive and will have debilitating brain damage, against all odds he is now employed!
This amazing lady and her husband look after/adopt a lot of children in need. Her posts are amazing and can be found here https://www.tiktok.com/@justthebells10 Yeah I know its Tiktoc, but she deserves all the attention she can get when it comes to her fantastic work to help kids.
item.dc:creator: GreenPinkBlueDead

item.title: Things to consider about abortion
item.description: No one is pro-abortion, it’s about a deeply personal choice. Let’s respect privacy, dignity, and self-determination.
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: I wish my dad was like that
item.dc:creator: JustineFromG2A

item.title: I'm so happy today.
item.description:
We finally kicked these idiots out of my store. No more medical exemptions and if you refuse and try to continue doing your "shopping" we call the police. They have also said (the police) that we can use reasonable force to remove somebody they already removed for us once after he told them he was just going to come back, which of course he did, we scooped him up by the shoulders and walked him out. He got arrested (rather than driven to the end of town like they did the first time) and is being charged with mischief and trespassing. Mask up, I'm tired.
We don't care about your expemtion, we have way more shoppers who wear a mask and people like yourself should use our online shopping and not be a complete idiot and make a fool out of yourself. If you can't shop online come to the door and tell us we will set that up for you with pen and paper. We will supply a mask free of charge! Tldr: We no longer let medical exemptions into our store without a mask, we don't care about your bullshit and lies.
item.dc:creator: SemiLucidUser

item.title: 11th cakeday, random bull go!
item.description:
All stolen. Our memes.
I’m still covid free. Triple vaxed.
The gf sent these two. Gotta love her.
The Danes will know
Poor photo from a train station outside Copenhagen the other day.
I’m not ALL inappropriate humour
Oh yeah. That’s the stuff
A game for the whole family
My four year old demanded to play D&D. I was so happy.
The offspring may have covid. Waiting on a test…
So I’m trying to work with her at home.
Mild symptoms so the energy level is…bananas
It’s early, but maybe you can use this tomorrow
In lieu of cat tax as I do not have one. 11 years here. I wonder how much time I have wasted
item.dc:creator: Djchoragos

item.title: Football coach makes a wholesome request…
item.dc:creator: ALittleDistantShiningStar

item.title: Let there be light!
item.description:
The final touch of my first nocturne painting. This is a little night scene that I saw on an early morning commute. It was a quiet, cool morning, and I saw this lone building being lit but a light. I just had to turn around and take a picture. I really enjoyed painting this scene, and trying to create the illusion of light. I hope you all enjoy. 12x16" oil on canvas.
Edit: If you'd like to see more of my work, I post a lot on here, but I post EVERYTHING art related on my Instagram: www.instagram.com/paintings_by_adam_stevens
item.dc:creator: PilotBuilder

item.title: TIL I lack Emotional Permanence
item.description: TIL that I lack emotional permanence! I knew in general that issue, but didn't have the words to explain what all encapsulated this problem. It's very exciting because the more I learn about my disorder, the easier it gets to manage. This is a very large puzzle piece. I hope that it can help you too if you need it! This is a throwaway account for reasons. Most Viral edit: Wow. I didn't expect this many people to connect to this in the same way I did when I found it. I've been getting choked up at some of these comments because that was my exact reaction. This gives me a lot of encouragement to share this sort of information in the future. Thank you for the Accolades, and thank you all for your words. Tweet link: https://twitter.com/eesabella_/status/1285208884311982081?t=Ojok5rxHyvU3sb90IaZokw&s=19
item.dc:creator: ShhhhhhSecretAccount

item.title: Breaking the selfie rule but I finally got exploratory pelvic surgery after nearly 20 years of pain and I'm so excited!
item.description: Rather large fibroid and ovarian cyst removed, waiting for news on what else they found! I got my period when I was 8 and when I hit 14, my periods got really heavy and thr cramps just got unbearable. At one point, it was so bad that I had to use a wheelchair for most of my walking outside of home. I've had two IUDs, both of which became embedded in my cervix. I've been on every type of birth control, Lupron, opioid, a special diet. Nothing really helped. The doctors in Canada refused to do any surgery because of the risk of scar tissue. I lost two jobs as a rest of missing work. I moved to the US and met the best OBGyn ever. It may be expensive but damn, the care here is amazing. Fingers crossed that this will make a difference!
item.dc:creator: ephsteph
